# Preferences

## Communication
- Mike prefers direct, non-fluffy responses.
- Be proactive when the next action is obvious.

## Home project capture
- When Mike mentions a home project, save it into the Obsidian vault unless the request is ambiguous.
- Track `Priority`, `Urgency`, `Level of effort`, `Cost`, and `Time estimate` for home projects.
- The home project system should support planning questions like "what can I do Saturday morning?"

## Backup / git
- When meaningful vault changes happen, proactively offer to commit and push the vault repo.
